title: Mystical Remnants
description: Mystical Remnants adds magical artifacts across your world
body:
**Mystical Remnants** adds artifacts that are scattered across the world in three types of **temples**

- Weapon
- Armor
- Books

When holding one of these items you gain a different buff for each one

**Weapons**

There are multiple types of weapons these are:
(weapon-buff-ability)

- Syith-Night vision-10 damage to all entities in 20 blocks
- Sword-Regeneration-Give the plague all entities in 20 blocks
- Dagger-Haste-Slowness to all entities in 20 blocks
- Longsword-Leaping-Poison all entities in 20 blocks
- Greatsword
- Hammer-Strength-Explosion
- Hand Axe-Saturation-Spawn 3 iron golems
- Battle Axe-Speed-Lightning strike all entities in 20 blocks
- Staff-Hero of the Village-Heal and tame(you can only tame the ones that are tamable) all entities in 20 blocks
- Katana-Fire resistance-Shoot a Fireball
- Glaive-5 more hearts-Give Levitation to all entities in 20 blocks

Each one serves its purpose

**Armor**

Armor protects you we all know that so there are now more of them

Here is a list of them:

- Lava King
more will be added later

**Books**

Each book has its special traits with a bit of a story in it too
